# CAOS - CA Practice Management Research
> Complete market research, competitive analysis, and product strategy for CA (Chartered Accountant) practice management, CRM, and document intelligence SaaS in India.

## About
This documentation contains comprehensive research on building a SaaS platform for Indian Chartered Accountant firms. It covers market analysis, competitive landscape (26+ competitors), product strategy, business model, and go-to-market approach.

## Key Topics
- Indian CA profession landscape (380,000+ ICAI members, 130,000+ practicing firms)
- Practice management software market
- CRM and client management for CA firms
- Document intelligence and automation
- Compliance workflow management
- Competitive analysis of 26 products
- Pricing and business model strategy
- Go-to-market strategy for Indian CA market

## Author
Rakesh Waghela - Technology & Product Consultant
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/rakeshwaghela
- X: https://x.com/webiyo

## Sections
- Market Research: Market sizing, CA landscape, seasonality, client segments, pain points
- Competitor Analysis: Deep dives into 26 competing products with features, pricing, strengths/weaknesses
- Product Strategy: Vision, USP, wedge, moat, feature prioritization, MVP, roadmap
- Business Model: Pricing strategy, revenue model, unit economics
- Go-to-Market: GTM strategy, customer acquisition, growth loops, upsell/cross-sell
- Features: Detailed feature catalog for practice management, CRM, document intelligence

## Documentation URL
https://javajack.github.io/caos/
